account_default.description: Default product cost Rs.85 for ALL ASINs (Msir confirmed). Includes manufacturing + packing + everything.

amazon_fees.description: Referral Fee = 3% of sale price + Closing Fee Rs.5 fixed

return_rate.description: Average return rate. Cost of return = return_rate% of sale_price

description_target: Keep 60% of true profit after ads. Ads can eat max 40%.
